title: heterotheca depressa
intro: Heterotheca depressa, also known as the low goldenrod, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. The leaves and flowers of Heterotheca depressa are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Heterotheca depressa can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully explore its potential benefits and uses.
